chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
text: The Texas Department of Motor Vehicles may adopt rules relating to the registration and issuance of license plates to neighborhood electric vehicles.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.302 — Registration

The Texas Department of Motor Vehicles may adopt rules relating to the registration and issuance of license plates to neighborhood electric vehicles.

*Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 933 (H.B.3097), Sec. 2I.01, eff. September 1, 2009.*

subsections.text: The Texas Department of Motor Vehicles may adopt rules relating to the registration and issuance of license plates to neighborhood electric vehicles.
